leadText: Steamroller (Japanese: ハードローラー Hard Roller) is a damage-dealing Bug-type move introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation V 1.2 Generations VI and VII 1.3 Generation VIII onwards Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation V [ edit | edit source ] Steamroller inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of causing the target to flinch . Steamroller cannot make a target with a substitute flinch. If the target has used Minimize , Steamroller deals double its regular damage. Generations VI and VII [ edit | edit source ] If the target has used Minimize , Steamroller now bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly . Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Steamroller cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS The user crushes its targets by rolling over them with its rolled-up body. This attack may make the target flinch. S M US UM P E The user crushes its target by rolling over the target with its rolled-up body. This may also make the target flinch. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It damages an enemy. It could also cause the Cringe status condition, which makes the enemy unable to attack or use moves. S MD It damages an enemy. It could also make the enemy flinch.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Steamroller is the only Bug-type move capable of making the target flinch .
